description: Horizontal bar chart of average School Performance Grade scores for North Carolina's eight SBE regions in 2023, sorted highest to lowest. The Sandhills region's bar is highlighted in navy (57.1, the lowest); all other regions are neutral grey.

title.text: Average School Performance Grade score by region, 2023
title.subtitle: Every bar neutral grey; one region in navy to draw the eye. Navy marks attention — not good or bad.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI sample school data, SY2019–2023. Style-guide demo.
